summary: Backend testing for new Admin Compliance Dashboard and Social Feed features (Iteration 250). All 19 tests passed. Fixed a bug in the bulk-review-appeals endpoint where parameters were not properly wrapped in a Pydantic model.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: POST /api/compliance/violations/bulk-review-appeals had violation_ids and approved as direct function parameters instead of wrapped in a Pydantic model, causing 422 validation errors
Added BulkReviewAppealsRequest Pydantic model to properly parse JSON body
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new endpoints are working correctly. The bulk-review-appeals endpoint now properly accepts JSON body with violation_ids, approved, and notes fields.

TestComplianceDashboardLocationFraudMap.test_dashboard_returns_location_fraud_ma: PASSED - Returns location_fraud_map_data array with coordinates
TestComplianceDashboardLocationFraudMap.test_dashboard_location_fraud_map_data_s: PASSED - Items have id, claimed, actual, distance_miles, severity, created_at

TestBulkReviewAppeals.test_bulk_review_appeals_endpoint_exists: PASSED - Accepts empty array, returns processed=0
TestBulkReviewAppeals.test_bulk_review_appeals_with_invalid_id: PASSED - Returns errors for non-existent IDs
TestBulkReviewAppeals.test_bulk_review_appeals_response_struct: PASSED - Returns processed, total, approved, errors

TestPostReactionsDetail.test_reactions_detail_with_existing_post: PASSED - Returns post_id, total_reactions, total_likes, reactions_by_emoji, all_reactors, likers
TestPostReactionsDetail.test_reactions_detail_reactor_structure: PASSED - Reactors have user_id, full_name, avatar_url, role, reacted_at, emoji

TestSearchMentions.test_search_mentions_requires_query: PASSED - Returns 422 for missing q param
TestSearchMentions.test_search_mentions_response_structure: PASSED - Users have id, user_id, full_name, email, avatar_url, role
TestSearchMentions.test_search_mentions_by_email: PASSED - Finds users by email prefix

TestIntegrationFlow.test_mention_search_to_post_flow: PASSED - Search users and use for mentions

verified_features: GET /api/compliance/dashboard - Returns location_fraud_map_data array with coordinate pairs for GPS fraud visualization
POST /api/compliance/violations/bulk-review-appeals - Processes multiple appeals at once with violation_ids array and approved boolean
GET /api/posts/{id}/reactions-detail - Returns detailed list of who reacted/liked with all_reactors and likers arrays
GET /api/users/search-mentions?q=test - Returns users for @mention autocomplete by full_name or email
POST /api/posts - Accepts mentions array and creates notifications for mentioned users

bug_fixed.fix: Added BulkReviewAppealsRequest Pydantic model and updated endpoint to use data: BulkReviewAppealsRequest parameter
bug_fixed.root_cause: FastAPI requires List and bool parameters to be wrapped in a Pydantic model for proper JSON body parsing
